title: Need help maximising Monday's potential
excerpt:
Hello! I work for a small video production company based in Wales and am looking to overhaul our Monday setup. 
Currently I don’t feel we’re using this platform to its maximum potential, and I want to work with a consult…

posts.author: Rockarox (Roxanne Morton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I work for a small video production company based in Wales and am looking to overhaul our Monday setup.

Currently I don’t feel we’re using this platform to its maximum potential, and I want to work with a consultant to tailor it specifically to our needs. We already use some apps that I would like to integrate and learn how to use through Monday, I am also open to switching from any other software we use that may not work with Monday, to one that does.

As well as integrations I’m keen to explore CRM capabilities and automations.

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Rockarox and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

This sounds like a very exciting project and I would be interested in seeing how the team at CarbonWeb might be able to help. We are a Channel Partner with monday.com and spend our days helping users in new and exciting ways. Considering you mentioned a potential CRM, I encourage you to check out the CarbonCRM Suite.

I’d love to connect and explore your use case with monday.com, in turn I would like to discuss the ways you can leverage our team.

Feel free to grab some time with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get started!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Rockarox ,

Welcome to the monday community!

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out. At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 5 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing custom solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

Our team of experts can help you optimize your workflow , keep track of all your projects, automatize most of your processes, streamline your communications and ensure your account is set up according to monday best practices. To add ,we are also very acquainted with monday’s CRM capabilities!

We also have a wealth of experience in creating both custom and native integrations, and can ensure that they are utilized to their fullest potential in optimizing your workflow by integrating with any other software you might possibly use.

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements! Alternatively, if none of the available time slots work out for you, please contact us at info@thespelas.com so we can do our best to accommodate you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
